content.query:
/** When Ampush is coded in as a Sub Source - For FHI, PHI and SWR */

SELECT
lds.id as [Lead]
,cst.FirstName
,cst.LastName
,cst.Email
,cst.Phone
,lds.EntryDate
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,brn.LongName as Market
,prd.ProductID as Product
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.Zip
,cst.[State]
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDisposition
,case when lds.ApptSet = 'True' then 1 else 0 end as ApptSet
,case when lds.Sat = 'True' then 1 else 0 end as Demo
,case when lds.Sold = 'True' then 1 else 0 end as Sold
,job.GrossAmount as GrossSales
,case when job.JobNetAmt = 0 then job.GrossAmount else job.JobNetAmt end  as NetSales
,job.id as JobID
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,'SWR' as OperatingCompany
,GETDATE() as LastUpdateTS
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_SWR_Lds_Leads] lds
inner join [ODS].[LP_SWR_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join
[ODS].[LP_SWR_app_Appointments] app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_SWR_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_prd_Products] prd
on job.productid = prd.ProductID
where
 srs.descr = 'Ampush'


 /** When Ampush is coded in as a Source - For MAC */

SELECT
lds.id as [Lead]
,cst.FirstName
,cst.LastName
,cst.Email
,cst.Phone
,lds.EntryDate
,app.SetDate as AppointmentSetDate
,app.ApptDate as AppointmentDate
,brn.LongName as Market
,prd.ProductID as Product
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.Zip
,cst.[State]
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDisposition
,case when lds.ApptSet = 'True' then 1 else 0 end as ApptSet
,case when lds.Sat = 'True' then 1 else 0 end as Demo
,case when lds.Sold = 'True' then 1 else 0 end as Sold
,job.GrossAmount as GrossSales
,case when job.JobNetAmt = 0 then job.GrossAmount else job.JobNetAmt end  as NetSales
,job.id as JobID
,jbs.Descr as JobStatus
,'MAC' as OperatingCompany
,GETDATE() as LastUpdateTS
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_MAC_Lds_Leads] lds
left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_SWR_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join
[ODS].[LP_MAC_app_Appointments] app
on lds.id = app.lds_id
left join
[ODS].[LP_MAC_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_MAC_prd_Products] prd
on job.productid = prd.ProductID
where
 lds.src_id like 'Ampush'
